title: The Blood Mimicer
body:
THE BLOOD MIMICER
This mod is very strange. It adds another player to the game, but is not considered a friend. He does not have eyes. Blood oozes from his mouth. His smile does not bode well. He carries a flint and steel in his hand. He burns others using them. Sometimes he is invisible and also has ghosts that watch you. They are very weak and disappear when you approach. But he himself is more dangerous than you can imagine

This mod load jumpscares
